name: Feedyou Bot Messaging API
description: This API allows to use Feedyou bot with omnichannel solution which allows sending and receiving text messages to the user using various channeks. - When user starts conversation and routing rule tells that bot should handle this conversation, `beginIntroDialog` event is sent to the bot - Bot loads set of intro messages and sends them one by one to the endpoind specified by `serviceUrl` in incoming event - Omnichannel should show this messages to the user, optionally with set of suggested reply buttons, carousel attachment or disabled/enabled text input based on `inputHint` setting - When user clicks on the button or sends text message, `message` event is being sent to the bot - Bot can decide that user should be transferred to the operator and `handoff` event is send back to omnichannel (optionally with any key-value metadata gathered during conversation or preferred operator group/skill) - When it is needed to route user back to the bot from operator, `cancelHandoff` event can be used See the following sequence diagram to understand basic principles.
